mapper.select:
SELECT
board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, board_idx as boardIdx, subject as subject, subject_eng as subjectEng, hit_count as hitCount,
DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated,
DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%b %e %Y') as dateCreated,
user_id_created as userIdCreated, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreated,
/* DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, */
DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified,
DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%b %e %Y') as dateModified,
user_id_modified as userIdModified, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModified, open_yn
FROM
board_article b
WHERE
delete_yn = 'N'
and board_article_idx != 0
AND board_idx = #{boardIdx}
AND board_idx in ( select c.board_idx from board c where exists (select d.board_article_idx from board_article d where d.board_idx = c.board_idx and d.delete_yn = 'N' and d.open_yn = 'Y') )
/* openYn : ${openYn} */
AND open_yn = 'y'
/* openYn : ${openYn} */
AND b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND ( b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') OR b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') )
ORDER BY
date_created DESC
LIMIT #{listLimit} OFFSET #{listOffset}

SELECT
board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, board_idx as boardIdx, subject as subject, content as content, subject_eng as subjectEng, hit_count as hitCount,
DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated,
DATE_FORMAT(date_created, '%b %e %Y') as dateCreated,
user_id_created as userIdCreated, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreated, DATE_FORMAT(date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified, user_id_modified as userIdModified, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModified, open_yn
FROM
board_article b
WHERE
delete_yn = 'N'
and board_article_idx != 0
AND board_idx = #{boardIdx}
/* openYn : ${openYn} */
AND open_yn = 'y'
/* openYn : ${openYn} */
AND b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND ( b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') OR b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') )
ORDER BY
date_created DESC
LIMIT #{listLimit} OFFSET #{listOffset}

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS CNT
FROM
board_article b
WHERE
delete_yn = 'N'
and board_article_idx != 0
AND board_idx = #{boardIdx}
AND board_idx in ( select c.board_idx from board c where exists (select d.board_article_idx from board_article d where d.board_idx = c.board_idx and d.delete_yn = 'N' and d.open_yn = 'Y') )
AND open_yn = 'y'
AND b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND ( b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') OR b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') )

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS CNT
FROM
board_article b
WHERE
delete_yn = 'N'
and board_article_idx != 0
AND board_idx = #{boardIdx}
AND open_yn = 'y'
AND b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND ( b.subject like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') OR b.content like concat('%', #{searchValue}, '%') )

SELECT
b.board_article_idx as boardArticleIdx, b.board_idx as boardIdx, c.board_name as boardName, b.subject as subject, b.content as content, b.subject_eng as subjectEng, b.content_eng as contentEng, b.hit_count as hitCount,
DATE_FORMAT(b.date_created, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateCreated,
DATE_FORMAT(b.date_created, '%b %e %Y') as dateCreated,
b.user_id_created as userIdCreated, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreated, (select user_name_en from user where user_id = b.user_id_created) as userNameCreatedEng,
DATE_FORMAT(b.date_modified, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateModified,
DATE_FORMAT(b.date_modified, '%b %e %Y') as dateModified,
b.user_id_modified as userIdModified, (select user_name_ko from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModified, (select user_name_en from user where user_id = b.user_id_modified) as userNameModifiedEng, b.open_yn as openYn
FROM board_article b, board c
WHERE board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx}
AND open_yn = 'y'
and b.board_idx = c.board_idx
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_article ( board_idx, subject, content, subject_eng, content_eng, date_created, user_id_created, open_yn ) VALUES ( #{boardIdx}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{subjectEng}, #{contentEng}, now(), #{userIdCreated}, #{openYn} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE
attachment
SET
board_idx = #{boardIdx},
board_article_idx = #{boardArticleIdx},
attachment_order = CASE
WHEN attachment_idx = #{attachmentIdx} THEN (#{index} + 1)
END
WHERE attachment_idx IN
#{attachmentIdx}
AND flag_deleted = '0'
